title: World: 23806
description:
Enter a procedurally generated unknown world. Defeat enemies, collect equipment, and come back alive.

This is a first-person shooter action roguelite game. You will explore, fight, and collect equipment in a mysterious procedural world, growing stronger each time you enter the unknown.

The core experience is a short-session, high-intensity exploration loop: enter the world, face enemies, search for chests, obtain weapons and items, then decide whether to push deeper or return with your rewards. Each run brings different terrain, resources, enemies, loot, and combat pacing.

You can use firearms, melee weapons, and unarmed attacks to deal with different enemies. As your exploration progresses, you will obtain new equipment, improve your character, and gradually build your own combat style.

In this world, death is not the end. Every failure becomes part of your preparation for the next journey. You must choose between risk and reward: continue exploring more dangerous areas, or return in time to preserve what you have gained.

Game Features:

First-person shooting combined with melee action combat

Procedurally generated worlds to explore

Action roguelite loop: enter, fight, collect, return, and upgrade

Multiple weapons and equipment drops

Short-session gameplay built around chests, enemies, resources, and random encounters

Single-player exploration designed for repeated runs

A mysterious, lonely, post-apocalyptic atmosphere

This game currently focuses on building a replayable core loop: explore the unknown world, defeat enemies, obtain equipment, and go farther in the next run.
description_short: Enter a mysterious procedural world in this first-person action roguelite shooter. Fight enemies, search for loot, open chests, upgrade your character, and decide when to push deeper or return alive with your rewards.
